name: The Dental Edge
description:
At The Dental Edge, we are committed to enhancing your dental health with a range of specialized treatments in a comfortable and patient-centered environment. Located conveniently at Anand Bhutada, Vinayak Sankul Rd, Bytco Point, Rajwada Nagar, Nashik Road, Nashik, our clinic is designed to ensure a relaxing and positive experience with every visit.

Our services span from routine dental care to advanced treatments, including Implants, Root Canal Therapy, Prosthetic Dentistry, Kid’s Dental Care, and Aesthetic Dentistry. We are dedicated to crafting beautiful smiles while supporting overall health. By focusing on pain relief, improved digestion, and enhanced confidence, we help our patients enjoy better mental well-being and quality of life.

competitors.name: Super Speciality Dental and Implant Center

featured_reviews.name: Vineet Joshi
featured_reviews.review_text: Dr. Tulsi provided clear communication about the cavities, explaining which fillings required urgent attention and which could be deferred. The teeth cleaning was completed first and was done thoroughly. Appointment flow was smooth with minimal waiting time, making the overall experience efficient and comfortable.
featured_reviews.response_from_owner_text:
We are glad you like the service.
Thank you for trusting us 🙏🏻

featured_reviews.name: tejas bhojwani
featured_reviews.review_text: “One of the best dental clinics I’ve visited. Modern equipment, clean environment, and very professional approach. The doctor took time to understand my problem and suggested the right treatment. Completely satisfied with the service.”
featured_reviews.response_from_owner_text: Thank you.Glad you liked our service 🤗

featured_reviews.name: Anu Kadam
featured_reviews.review_text: I had my aligner treatment done at this dental clinic. The doctor was very professional and supportive, and the treatment experience was smooth. I’m satisfied with the results. Highly recommended.
featured_reviews.response_from_owner_text:
Thank you for trusting us.
We are glad you are satisfied with the treatment

featured_reviews.name: khushboo chhajed
featured_reviews.review_text: "Great experience! The dentist was very gentle and explained everything clearly. Highly recommended!"

featured_reviews.name: Urvashi Varma
featured_reviews.review_text:
Honestly, i was worrried as i was taking my 17 month old daughter for her first dental checkup. But Tulsi, with her handson experience and patience, managed to check her so easily. Even my daughter enjoyed the whole process! :) It was a big big relief!

Also, her suggestions were quite helpful wrt my mom's tooth implant and yearly cleaning of teeth.
featured_reviews.response_from_owner_text:
Thank you 
Glad you liked it☺️
